speaker: [player]
text: Grubwin. How did you actually end up here?

speaker: Grubwin
text: Vermia cornered me in the library and said, and I quote, 'You have thoughtful eyes. Scatha needs thoughtful eyes in the club.'

speaker: Vermia
text: He DID have thoughtful eyes! He DOES!

speaker: Grubwin
text: I was reading. I was just trying to read. She sat down across from me and did a ten-minute pitch.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I had nothing else to do on Fridays. And the pitch was — I mean, it was genuinely compelling.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Anyway. I came once to be polite. Then I came back because the poems were actually interesting. Then it became a habit. That was two years ago.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Don't tell Vermia this but it's probably the best part of my week.

speaker: Vermia
text: SCATHA HEARD THAT AND HE IS PLEASED.
